mapper.select: SELECT CAST(json_value AS CHAR) FROM site_config WHERE config_key = 'site.profile' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_config (config_key, json_value, data_type, is_public, description) VALUES ('site.profile', CAST(#{profileJson} AS JSON), 'JSON', 1, '公开个人资料') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE json_value = CAST(#{profileJson} AS JSON), data_type = 'JSON', is_public = 1, description = '公开个人资料'
